articles.title: Brookline voters overwhelmingly approve tax override to avoid school, public safety cuts
articles.description:
is used to specify article abstract. You can only provide plain text in this element. --> Nearly 60 percent of voters approved Brookline’s Question 1, with 8,859 votes for yes and 5,826 voting no, according to official results shared with Boston.com.
